simple_types.name: Name_Conflict_Intervention
simple_types.code:
type Name_Conflict_Intervention is
  (yes, no, yes_to_all, none, rename_it, abort_now);

simple_types.name: Option
simple_types.code:
type Option is
  (test_only,
   junk_directories,
   case_sensitive_match,
   extract_as_text);

enumeration_literals.name: junk_directories
enumeration_literals.description: ignore directory info -> extract to current one

enumeration_literals.name: extract_as_text
enumeration_literals.description: files will be written with native line endings

array_types.name: Option_Set
array_types.code: type Option_Set is array (Option) of Boolean;

record_types.name: FS_Routines_Type

access_types.name: Compose_Func
Create_Path_Proc
Get_Password_Proc
access_types.code:
type Get_Password_Proc is access
  procedure (password : out Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Unbounded_String);

access_types.name: Resolve_Conflict_Proc
Set_Time_Stamp_Proc
access_types.code:
type Set_Time_Stamp_Proc is access
  procedure (file_name : String; stamp : Ada.Calendar.Time);

access_types.name: Set_ZTime_Stamp_Proc
access_types.code:
type Set_ZTime_Stamp_Proc is access
  procedure (file_name : String; stamp : Zip.Time);

documentation.description:
NB: you can use Zip.Convert to change Ada.Calendar.Time from/to Zip.Time
    or use our Split to avoid using Ada.Calendar at all.

access_types.name: Tell_Data_Proc

constants.name: null_routines
constants.code: null_routines : constant FS_Routines_Type := (null, null, null, null);

documentation.description: If password is wrong at the Nth attempt, Wrong_password is raised
reset to "yes" for a new session (in case of yes_to_all / none state!)
